title: Beehiiv vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Flodesk email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which platform suits your needs.
h1: Beehiiv vs Flodesk: Complete Comparison for 2025
intro: Beehiiv and Flodesk are both modern email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter publishers with monetization capabilities, while Flodesk emphasizes beautiful design and unlimited subscribers at a flat rate. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize revenue generation or visual aesthetics.

comparison_table.tool_a: $0 free tier (up to 2,500 subscribers) or $39/month paid
2,500 on free plan; unlimited on paid plans
Newsletter monetization, ad network, referral program, web reader
comparison_table.tool_b: Stunning templates, flat monthly pricing, checkout forms, link in bio

choose_a_if: You want to monetize your newsletter through ads and sponsored content
You're starting small and need a free tier with 2,500 subscriber support
You need advanced segmentation and audience analytics for publishers
choose_b_if: You want unlimited subscribers on any paid plan without tiering costs
Visual design and beautiful email templates are your top priority
You need integrated checkout forms and link-in-bio features for e-commerce

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your needs. Beehiiv excels at newsletter monetization and has a free tier, making it ideal for publishers. Flodesk wins for visual design, unlimited subscribers at any tier, and e-commerce features like checkout forms. Both have strong ratings and active affiliate programs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Flodesk?
faq.a: Beehiiv is cheaper if you're just starting, thanks to its free tier supporting up to 2,500 subscribers. For paid plans, both start around $38-39/month, but Flodesk offers unlimited subscribers at that price, while Beehiiv's pricing scales with subscriber growth. Beehiiv becomes more economical only if you stay under 2,500 subscribers.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your subscriber list and campaigns between platforms, though you'll need to set up designs and workflows again since they work differently. Both platforms typically support CSV exports and imports. Plan your migration carefully to minimize downtime, and test your campaigns before going live with your audience.
